description: SPEC §5 / §10. Add the advisory `min_bl_version` config field: a newer bl whose version is below it warns; older clients ignore it. This is the documented (not engineered) mitigation for the one accepted BC caveat — an old bl on a deferred-mode repo running `bl review` still does the old local-squash, contaminating the integration branch (epic bl-00ca ACCEPTED CAVEAT 2026-05-10). bl-b017 [bl-b017] scoped the `delivery` block to `mode` only; min_bl_version is advisory-only and was not in its acceptance. May fold into docs ball bl-5305 if preferred.
title: Advisory min_bl_version in config
